title: Morning Briefing (daily anchor)
_note: DRAFT v2 (#MorningBriefing). Daily morning anchor — absorbs old #MacroBrief. Market-dependent: fill every [..] with real values on publish day, then set ready=true. Never invent prices.
body:
☀️ #MorningBriefing — [date]

Where the market stands and where we're hunting today.

The tape:
• BTC is around [BTC price] after [recent move] — momentum reads [building / cooling / neutral].
• ETH is [tracking / leading / lagging] BTC; [ETH/BTC read] tells us where rotation leans.
• Funding & positioning: [funding read] — the crowd is leaning [long/short]. Crowded extremes are something we fade, not chase.

On the radar:
• [support level] and [resistance level] on BTC — the lines that decide today's move.
• [coin/event placeholder] — watching for a clean setup, not forcing one.
• [macro/liq-heatmap note] — where the stops are stacked.

If a setup clears our data-check today, it ships to VIP as a signal — SL set before entry, Signal ID attached. The demo version lands here on delay.

We don't predict the day. We map it, check the data, and pull the trigger only when ≥2 things line up.

#MorningBriefing
